description_short: Chicago is the third-largest US city, exposed to severe summer storms, occasional tornadoes, and brutal winter blizzards off Lake Michigan.
description_long: Located on the southwestern shore of Lake Michigan, Chicago faces severe summer thunderstorms and occasional tornadoes, plus heavy winter storms, lake-effect snow, and dangerous wind chills. Cook County is served by NWS Chicago (office code LOT) within forecast zone ILZ104 (Cook).
